description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Automated Test Build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: build-windows and build-linux. The build-windows job runs on a Windows environment with a matrix strategy for different Windows configurations, while the build-linux job runs on an Ubuntu environment with a matrix strategy for different Ubuntu configurations. Both jobs check out the repository, update submodules, download and extract dependencies, and build the project using premake and MSBuild.
